patterns.name: extract_wisdom
patterns.description: Extract surprising insights, ideas, quotes, habits, facts, and recommendations from any content. Use when summarizing articles, videos, podcasts, or books to capture the key takeaways.

patterns.name: extract_main_idea
patterns.description: Distill the core thesis of a piece of content into a single clear statement. Use when you need to quickly identify what a text is really arguing.

patterns.name: extract_insights
patterns.description: Pull out the most refined, abstracted insights from content. Use when you want distilled wisdom rather than raw facts.

patterns.name: extract_recommendations
patterns.description: List every actionable recommendation from a piece of content. Use when processing advice articles, tutorials, or expert interviews.

patterns.name: extract_references
patterns.description: Extract all citations, references, and mentioned sources from content. Use when building a reading list from an article or paper.

patterns.name: analyze_paper
patterns.description: Evaluate an academic paper across quality, contribution, and methodology dimensions. Use when reviewing research papers or preprints.

patterns.name: analyze_prose
patterns.description: Critique writing across novelty, clarity, and prose style dimensions. Use when reviewing your own or others' written work.

patterns.name: analyze_answers
patterns.description: Evaluate the quality of answers to questions. Use when grading interviews, tests, or Q&A sessions.

patterns.name: analyze_logs
patterns.description: Identify patterns, anomalies, and root causes in log files. Use when debugging production issues or investigating incidents.

patterns.name: analyze_incident
patterns.description: Break down a security or operational incident into root cause, impact, and mitigation steps. Use when writing post-mortems.

patterns.name: analyze_risk
patterns.description: Assess risks in a proposal, system, or decision. Use when evaluating trade-offs or planning mitigations.

patterns.name: analyze_comments
patterns.description: Summarize the sentiment and key themes in a set of comments. Use when processing user feedback or PR review comments.

patterns.name: analyze_threat_report
patterns.description: Extract threat intelligence from security reports. Use when processing vendor threat bulletins or CVE advisories.

patterns.name: find_logical_fallacies
patterns.description: Identify logical fallacies in an argument. Use when evaluating essays, debates, or persuasive content.

patterns.name: rate_content
patterns.description: Score content on quality, originality, and usefulness. Use when triaging articles or deciding what is worth reading.

patterns.name: create_prd
patterns.description: Draft a product requirements document from a feature description. Use when starting a new feature or scoping a project.

patterns.name: create_design_document
patterns.description: Write a technical design document about a system or component. Use when preparing an RFC or architectural proposal.

patterns.name: create_stride_threat_model
patterns.description: Generate a STRIDE threat model from a system architecture. Use when performing security reviews of new designs.

patterns.name: create_threat_scenarios
patterns.description: Enumerate realistic threat scenarios against a system. Use during security planning and red-team exercises.

patterns.name: create_git_diff_commit
patterns.description: Generate a conventional commit message from a git diff. Use when you need a clean commit message and don't want to write it by hand.

patterns.name: create_command
patterns.description: Generate a shell command from a described task. Use when you know what you want but can't remember the flags.

patterns.name: create_summary
patterns.description: Create a tight, well-structured summary of any input. Use when briefing yourself on a long document.

patterns.name: create_coding_feature
patterns.description: Plan the implementation of a new coding feature from a description. Use when starting a non-trivial feature.

patterns.name: summarize
patterns.description: Produce a concise, information-dense summary of arbitrary content. Use as a general-purpose summarization tool.

patterns.name: summarize_git_changes
patterns.description: Summarize a series of git changes (log or diff). Use when writing release notes or retrospectives.

patterns.name: summarize_meeting
patterns.description: Convert a meeting transcript into decisions, action items, and key discussion points. Use after recording meetings.

patterns.name: improve_writing
patterns.description: Rewrite text to be clearer, more concise, and more engaging while preserving meaning. Use when polishing drafts.

patterns.name: humanize
patterns.description: Rewrite AI-generated text so it reads more like human writing. Use when AI output sounds stilted or formulaic.

patterns.name: write_pull-request
patterns.description: Write a complete pull request description from a set of changes. Use when preparing PRs against code review.

patterns.name: write_essay
patterns.description: Draft a well-structured essay on a given topic. Use when working on long-form writing where clarity of argument matters.

patterns.name: review_code
patterns.description: Review code on bugs, style issues, and improvements. Use as a complementary pass alongside other code review tools.

patterns.name: explain_code
patterns.description: Explain what a piece of code does in plain language. Use when onboarding to unfamiliar code or documenting legacy systems.

patterns.name: clean_text
patterns.description: Strip noise (ads, navigation, boilerplate) from scraped text content. Use when preprocessing web-extracted content.
